channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Australian citizens to return from hantavirus-hit cruise ship with strict quarantine measures
item.description: The Australian government is organising the repatriation of six citizens and residents who were on board the MV Hondius, a Dutch cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak. Four Australian citizens...

item.title: Jonas Lovv Represents Norway with Rock Song ‘Ya Ya Ya’ at Eurovision 2026
item.description: Norwegian singer Jonas Lovv has been announced as Norway's representative for the Eurovision Song Contest 2026, performing his rock track 'Ya Ya Ya'. Lovv first gained recognition on the tenth season ...

item.title: Magix Enga’s Baby Mama Opens Up About Their Breakup and Raising Their Son Alone
item.description: Kenyan music producer Magix Enga is currently in the spotlight after his baby mama, Ruth Otieno, spoke out about their relationship. During a podcast on May 12, 2026, Ruth detailed her struggles raisi...

item.title: AfDB discussions target Africa's financing challenges
item.description: The African Development Bank (AfDB) is organising a series of meetings aimed at tackling the financing gap affecting African nations. The discussions will bring together finance ministers, development...

item.title: West Bengal Higher Secondary Exam 2026 Results Information
item.description: The West Bengal Higher Secondary (HS) examination results for 2026 have been announced. Students across the state have been eagerly waiting to know their performance, including pass percentages and th...

item.title: Railway employee Liaqat honoured posthumously for averting suicide attack in Attock
item.description: In a solemn ceremony at Aiwan-i-Sadr, President Asif Ali Zardari posthumously awarded the Sitara-i-Shujaat to Muhammad Liaqat, a railway worker who lost his life while courageously stopping a suicide ...

item.title: Scottish Premiership season finale to determine champion following Celtic's dramatic goal
item.description: The Scottish Premiership is set for a thrilling conclusion as the championship will be decided on the final day. Celtic's last-minute goal has dramatically altered the standings, keeping their title h...

item.title: Early Career of Ann Miller in 1930s Hollywood
item.description: The article looks back at the early years of actress and dancer Ann Miller during the late 1930s, highlighting how she launched her Hollywood career at an unusually young age. Born in 1923, Miller man...

item.title: India suspends sugar exports till September amid supply and monsoon concerns
item.description: India has imposed an immediate ban on sugar exports till September 30 in an effort to protect domestic supplies and control possible price increases in the local market. The decision was announced thr...

item.title: Eric Morecambe Centenary: The Enduring Legacy of Britain's Beloved Comedian
item.description: May 14 2026 marks the centenary of the birth of Eric Morecambe, one half of the iconic British comedy double act Morecambe and Wise. Known as 'the funny one' alongside Ernie Wise's straight man, Eric ...

item.title: Bengaluru Police Rescue Three Women from Prostitution Racket Operated by Two Women
item.description: In Bengaluru, two women were arrested for allegedly running a prostitution racket from rented houses, according to a statement by the city police. The arrests were conducted by the Central Crime Branc...

item.title: Tanzania launches green financing strategy to help farmers adapt to climate change
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The Tanzania Agricultural Development Bank (TADB) has introduced a new green financing strategy called the Green Agri-Finance Strategy 2025–2027. The main goal is to help farmers and a...

item.title: Senator Bato dela Rosa Surfaces at Senate Amid ICC Arrest Warrant and Security Incident
item.description: Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa resurfaced at the Senate on May 11 after reportedly evading an International Criminal Court (ICC) arrest warrant linked to alleged crimes against humanity during the Du...

item.title: 1957 Jensen 541 Deluxe: Innovative British Sports Saloon with Fiberglass Body
item.description: The 1957 Jensen 541 Deluxe was a remarkable British grand tourer that showcased pioneering use of fiberglass bodywork. Introduced in 1953, the car was one of the earliest to utilize this lightweight c...

item.title: Teresa Wilms Montt: Rebel Writer and Feminist Pioneer of Early 20th-Century Chile
item.description: Teresa Wilms Montt (1893–1921) was a pioneering Chilean writer, poet, and anarcha-feminist whose life was marked by rebellion, literary innovation, and personal tragedy. Born into an elite Chilean fam...

item.title: Ruto Emphasises Kenya’s Neutral Role Amid Sudan Conflict, Calls for Broader Peace Efforts
item.description: President William Ruto has strongly clarified Kenya’s neutral stance in the ongoing Sudan conflict, rejecting claims that Nairobi supports the paramilitary Rapid Support Forces (RSF) led by General He...

item.title: Katie Price expresses frustration over husband's missed UK visit and relationship issues
item.description: Katie Price publicly criticised her husband, Lee Andrews, after he failed to arrive in the UK for their scheduled Good Morning Britain interview, calling the situation a 'soap opera'. According to Kat...

item.title: Joseph Southall and His Mastery of Egg Tempera in the Arts and Crafts Movement
item.description: Joseph Southall (1861–1944) was a central figure in the British Arts and Crafts movement and a leading member of the Birmingham Group of artist-craftsmen. Renowned for his expertise in the challenging...

item.title: Elon Musk criticised for comments on Lupita Nyong’o’s casting in The Odyssey
item.description: Elon Musk has faced criticism after commenting on the casting of Lupita Nyong’o in Christopher Nolan’s forthcoming film, The Odyssey. Nyong’o, an Oscar-winning actress, has been cast in dual roles as ...

item.title: Xi Jinping highlights cooperative and cautious approach in US-China relations
item.description: On May 14, 2026, Chinese President Xi Jinping welcomed what he called a 'new positioning' in the relationship between China and the United States, following a summit with US President Donald Trump in ...
